title: GBP Lander, GBP & Site Phone Numbers - Client Communication Needed
description:
Hey ,

Similar situation here with Sunset as we saw with Henco. 

We’re preparing to implement the footer updates, but we’ve identified discrepancies with the Portland phone numbers between the website and the GBP. 

What we’re seeing:
  • Site is using different hardcoded numbers for call swapping in the footer and on the Portland landing page, both of which do not match the GBP
  • Portland GBP secondary number is currently being used across all citations
  • Portland GBP is not linking to the location page

Under normal circumstances, we would align everything to the citation number and update the site's NAP accordingly for consistency.

Before finalizing, we need the client to confirm the correct official local number for Portland (i.e., which number should be used online for NAP consistency). 

To avoid delays, we will proceed using Portland’s secondary GBP number — since it is already consistent across citations — unless we’re advised otherwise. 

Can you please reach out ASAP to: 
  • Inform them we will proceed with the citation-consistent number in the new footer
  • Confirm the correct local number for Portland
  • Ensure Gasworks updates Portland GBP's landing page links accordingly

Once confirmed, we’ll finalize alignment across the site and GBP.
 
Thanks!

Here is all of the information:

PORLAND

Number on site:
Hardcoded in Portland's content - 503-773-6695
Hardcoded in the footer - 503-500-5866

GBP Primary - (503) 500-5855

GBP Secondary - (503) 234-0611  

Location Page  - https://www.sunsethc.com/portland/

Current GBP Lander - https://www.sunsethc.com/?utm_source=google-gbp&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=*197*sunset-heating-portland

title: TCR Compliance Updates to all forms
description:
Seeking help w/ the following request for sunset please.  
https://www.sunsethc.com/

1. Add / update the check box text for all the forms on the site please. The check box should have these:
By checking this box, I consent to receive marketing and promotional calls, and emails from or on behalf of  Sunset Heating & Cooling and its affiliates using an automated system or auto dialer for any purpose, including heating, cooling, electrical and plumbing. Consent is not a condition of purchase, and I can opt-out at any time.

2. Add a 2nd check box text below the 1st one: (unchecked by default) checkbox:
By checking this box, I agree to receive marketing and promotional text messages from Sunset Heating & Cooling  at the number provided, including offers and service updates. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. View our Privacy Policy and Terms.

**Remember, this is for ALL forms on each of the Seattle sites. Also link to the Privacy Policy and new SMS-Terms pages (see no4 below). The blue text above should be hyperlinked.

3. Add text to he Privacy Policy page, add a paragraph like this:

SMS Privacy

Mobile information will not be shared with third parties/affiliates for marketing or promotional purposes. Text messaging opt-in data and consent will not be shared with any third parties. 


4. Create a new page for each of the sites. This is the page that is linked to from the "Terms" link in the new SMS form disclaimer:

https://brand-name/sms-terms/

SMS/Messaging & Opt-Out
By opting in to messaging from Sunset Heating & Cooling, you agree to receive appointment reminders, informational, marketing and other types of messages from us. Message frequency may vary and data rates from your provider may apply. You may opt out of all future messaging by replying STOP to any SMS message. You can also reply HELP for assistance, or info@sunsethc.com. You may also opt out or request assistance by calling Sunset Heating & Cooling at (503) 500-5866. When you opt out, you will receive no further messages from us.

Thanks!

title: Add GTM...
description:
, Sunset was left out of that list of GTMs that you completed a couple of months back. It needs to be added now.

The site currently has the Apex Global GTM, so we just need to add this Apex SS GTM (below).

Similar to what we did before, we'll need to transfer tags from the current GTM (GTM-5LCXVKW) into our Apex SS GTM.

There is also a UA Tag that's firing on the website, so if we can remove that as well, that would be great!


You should already have been given access, .


1. Paste this code as high in the <head> of the page as possible:

title: Sunset Website Edits
description:
Hi, seeking help if you can please take a look at the info provided by the client.

I have added the email verbatim to be sure:
---
I reviewed a few audit items that need attention on the Sunset website. Can you have your team review the items below? 

1. Indexable Pages
Several pages are duplicates or have no content and shouldn’t be indexed. Examples:
  • https://www.sunsethc.com/news-media/
  • https://www.sunsethc.com/monthly-special/
  • https://www.sunsethc.com/thank-you-for-being-our-neighbor/
Thank-you pages are also indexable and shouldn’t be.

2. Internal Linking
The homepage isn’t linked within the content of main service pages. Adding these links could help boost performance.

3. Heading Tags
Some H1s only say “HVAC services in [location].” These could be improved by including more specific keywords like a combination of heating, air conditioning, furnace, or heat pump.

4. Page Titles
Current titles split the keyword and service area with a | divider. There are also variations of the brand name. Some titles include “Call Sunset!” while others use “Sunset Heating & Cooling.”

Titles should follow this format:
Main service + in main geo | Sunset
If there’s room, use “Sunset Heating & Cooling.”

5. Orphan Pages
Pages under https://www.sunsethc.com/press-releases/ are all orphan pages.

6. Images
There are 34 images over 150KB, with some as large as 500KB.

7. Awards
No awards are listed on the homepage or on a dedicated awards page.

8. Duplicate Pages
Several pages scored 90% or more on the near duplicate test. These pages will need to be reviewed and modified to be unique. Here are the dupl. pages:
https://www.sunsethc.com/news-media/
https://www.sunsethc.com/thank-you-form-submitted/
https://www.sunsethc.com/monthly-special/
https://www.sunsethc.com/monthly-special/
https://www.sunsethc.com/news-media/
https://www.sunsethc.com/thank-you-form-submitted/
https://www.sunsethc.com/salem/air-conditioning/
https://www.sunsethc.com/air-conditioning/
https://www.sunsethc.com/odell/
https://www.sunsethc.com/hood-river/
https://www.sunsethc.com/cascade-locks/
https://www.sunsethc.com/hood-river/
https://www.sunsethc.com/cascade-locks/
https://www.sunsethc.com/odell/
https://www.sunsethc.com/financing/
https://www.sunsethc.com/financing/
https://www.sunsethc.com/the-dalles/
https://www.sunsethc.com/news-media/
https://www.sunsethc.com/cascade-locks/
https://www.sunsethc.com/thank-you-form-submitted/
https://www.sunsethc.com/financing/
https://www.sunsethc.com/monthly-special/
https://www.sunsethc.com/mosier/
https://www.sunsethc.com/carson/
https://www.sunsethc.com/mosier/
https://www.sunsethc.com/mosier/
https://www.sunsethc.com/lyle/
https://www.sunsethc.com/cascade-locks/

9. Content Optimization
There are lots of opportunities for improvements. There are keyword cannibalization issues going on, poorly rewritten and duplicate content, bad internal linking strategies, etc. Key pages should be reviewed and it's content redone to follow best practices. This will need to be expanded into a larger project.

Thanks much!

CC

title: New Page Request – KGW8 News Segment Video
description:
Hi Andrei,

Seeking help with a client request. They are asking if we can create a new page that feature our recent KGW8 news segment:
https://www.kgw.com/video/features/hello-rose-city/making-sure-your-home-stays-warm-and-comfortable-all-winter-long/283-6a62b220-1aa2-4914-8a0e-e3e2ea61f289 

And here’s a link where you can download the file:
https://assets.tegnaone.com/assets/KGW/videos/6a62b220-1aa2-4914-8a0e-e3e2ea61f289/video_6000.mp4 

They also sent some info about the page they would like:
 
If possible, please follow these steps:
  • Page title should be something similar to Home Heating Tips Winter Comfort in the Rose City | Sunset
  • H1 should be something like: How to Keep Your Home Warm & Comfortable All Winter Long in Portland
  • Embed the KGW video
  • Add short intro paragraph summarizing the segment and our involvement
  • Add a CTA to schedule service or learn more about our winter HVAC tune-ups
  • Include an outbound link crediting KGW as the source
  • Add video schema markup (VideoObject) for SEO

I was able to verify with Jason that we do not have access to their YT channel. I was thinking of adding the video there 1st then add it to the site. 

Please let us know if there are still other things we may need from the client. 

Thanks so much!

John already checked and  mentioned that this will affect the code of and from what he sees and may take a couple of hours. I have also informed Debra about this and asked if she will still like to continue.

Seeking your advise if Debra decides that she would like to have this on the site, will it be possible? Will it affect anything? And how long will it take to add it on the site.

I have added the screenshot John too from the site:

title: Need comments to reply to email requesting widespread website changes...
description:
Hey guys, I really like how cleanly laid out the Roth website is. And Wolfers has a lot of similar formatting. Can you please send these edits to Clixsy to make to the Sunset website? Feel free to challenge any of the items I have listed below. Thank you!


 


Toolbar Reformatting:

  • Let’s remove the ductless pump page from the toolbar on the website’s main page. Ductless mini splits can be an option beneath heating and air conditioning
  • I’d like to consolidate all services on the main page, like Roth’s website, so when you hover over top, you have the option to select from Heating, Air Conditioning, Plumbing, Drains, Electrical and Generators
  • Let’s remove the financing option under the About Us section and add it as a main page on the toolbar. I want to also include application integrations so customers can apply online. What do you need in order to do that?
  • Please rename Discounts to Promotions
  • Let’s add a page for our Membership Offering on the top
  • Let’s make Careers it’s own option at the top as well, removing it from the About Us section
  • Remove the Contact page from the top tool bar
  • Under the About Us section, I want to add our guarantees and our referral program section -

 


So, the main tool bar will now list About Us, Services, Membership, Financing, Promotions, Careers. With there now being more room at the top, let’s add the 100 year old logo to the right side of the page.


 


Main page reformatting:

  • Google reviews on the main page lists 1100 – can we update to current count?
  • I like how the contact us form is right at the top of the Roth page. Can we do the same by adding to the left-hand side of the main landing page and just shift the existing language over to the right?
  • Let’s replicate what’s listed under the Services section now, down below where we currently have “Furnace Installation, Furnace Repair and Maintenance, etc.” listed
  • Let’s replace the background photos with current promotions to rotate through and include a button for customers to book online now – rotate between a low monthly payment promo on a new furnace, a tune up promo, water heater promo and generator promo (see Right Now home page)
  • Incorporate the 100 year logo into the Book online button

 


Electrical page:

  • Need to add the following services

title: Mailgun integration
description:
Mailgun integration is failing.  The emails are being sent using our fallback email server.

Either re-enable Mailgun's account or disable mailgun API using Post SMTP plugin.

please contact Sunset and determine best course of action.
